story_title: Show member list with profile names in sidebar

questions.question: Does GroupManager.tsx import getGroupMembers from @internet-privacy/marmot-ts and use it to derive the member list from group.state?
questions.actionable_check: Read src/components/GroupManager.tsx. Verify the import of getGroupMembers and that it is called with group.state inside the useEffect.
questions.pass_criteria: Both the import and the call to getGroupMembers(group.state) are present.

questions.question: Does the Members section have data-testid="members-section" and each member li have data-testid="member-item"?
questions.actionable_check: Read src/components/GroupManager.tsx JSX. Confirm data-testid attributes on the section element and on each li inside the members list.

questions.question: Is the Members section hidden when no group is selected (selectedGroupId is null)?
questions.actionable_check: Read GroupManager.tsx JSX. Verify that the members section render is gated on selectedGroupId being truthy and members.length > 0.
questions.pass_criteria: Members section only renders when selectedGroupId is truthy and at least one member exists.

questions.question: Does the component fall back to shortenPubkey(hex) when no profile name is available for a member?
questions.actionable_check: Read GroupManager.tsx. Verify that the member display expression is profileNames.get(hex) ?? shortenPubkey(hex).
questions.pass_criteria: Fallback to shortenPubkey is used via nullish coalescing.

questions.question: Is a profile cache (Map<string, string>) used to avoid redundant network fetches?
questions.actionable_check: Read GroupManager.tsx. Verify profileCacheRef (useRef holding a Map) is used to skip already-fetched pubkeys in the useEffect.
evidence_required: profileCacheRef declared with useRef<Map<string, string>>(new Map())
questions.pass_criteria: Cache ref exists and is checked before making network requests.

questions.question: Does the useEffect re-run reactively when selectedGroupId or groups changes, ensuring the member list updates when a different group is selected?
questions.actionable_check: Read GroupManager.tsx. Verify useEffect dependency array includes selectedGroupId, groups, client, and relays.
evidence_required: useEffect dependency array: [selectedGroupId, groups, client, relays]
questions.pass_criteria: Dependency array contains all four values.

questions.question: Does e2e/tests/members.spec.ts contain at least 2 tests that navigate real app routes and interact with actual UI elements (no test.skip, no title-only assertions)?
questions.actionable_check: Read e2e/tests/members.spec.ts. Count tests, verify no test.skip(), verify page.locator/getByRole/getByPlaceholder interactions, verify assertions on [data-testid="members-section"] and [data-testid="member-item"].
evidence_required: Locator calls on members-section and member-item
questions.pass_criteria: At least 2 tests, zero skips, real UI interactions, assertions on members-section and member-item testids.

mandatory_questions.question: Is there any dead code introduced by this story?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Search for unused functions, classes, imports in src/components/GroupManager.tsx introduced by this story (members state, profileNames state, profileCacheRef, useEffect, Members JSX section).
evidence_required: Confirmation that all imports (getGroupMembers, shortenPubkey, hexToNpub, useEffect, useRef) are referenced in the file
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: No unused code in story scope.

mandatory_questions.question: Are there any duplicate implementations?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Check whether profile fetching logic or member list logic is duplicated elsewhere in the codebase.
evidence_required: Search result for getGroupMembers usages across src/
Confirmation only GroupManager.tsx implements this logic
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: No duplicate implementations of member fetching or profile resolution logic.

mandatory_questions.question: Do integration tests (E2E) validate the story's workflow end-to-end?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Verify e2e/tests/members.spec.ts exists and covers: auth -> create group -> members section appears -> member item listed.
evidence_required: Test: 'members section appears after group creation with at least one member'
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: At least one E2E test covers the happy path end-to-end.

mandatory_questions.question: Does every item in scope.includes have corresponding implementation AND verification?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Check each specified requirement: (1) Members section below invite form, (2) getGroupMembers usage, (3) kind:0 profile fetch, (4) name/displayName parsing, (5) shortenPubkey fallback, (6) hidden when no group, (7) reactive on group change, (8) profile cache, (9) data-testid attributes.
evidence_required: GroupManager.tsx implementation evidence for each item
Test or VQ referencing each item
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: All 9 spec requirements have both implementation evidence and test/verification evidence.

mandatory_questions.question: Does any code in this story contain stub markers indicating incomplete implementation?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Grep src/components/GroupManager.tsx and e2e/tests/members.spec.ts for: TODO, FIXME, HACK, XXX, placeholder, stub, 'not yet implemented', 'not yet integrated', 'will be implemented', 'would call'.
evidence_required: Grep output showing zero matches in production code
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: Zero stub/placeholder markers in production code.

mandatory_questions.question: Do E2E tests exist and pass for the member list feature?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Check e2e/tests/members.spec.ts exists and run `make e2e`
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: File exists and all E2E tests pass.

mandatory_questions.question: Do Playwright E2E tests exercise real user workflows through the actual application UI, with no skipped tests, no title-only assertions, and real UI interaction?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: 1. Read e2e/tests/members.spec.ts and verify tests navigate to real app routes (/). 2. Verify tests use page.getByPlaceholder, page.getByRole, page.locator for UI interactions. 3. Verify zero test.skip() calls. 4. Verify tests assert on data-testid elements (members-section, member-item), not just page title. 5. Verify Playwright config uses baseURL env var. 6. Verify tests run against Docker Compose full stack via make e2e.
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: All E2E tests: (a) navigate real app routes, (b) perform user actions, (c) assert observable outcomes via testid, (d) have zero test.skip(), (e) run against Docker Compose stack.
